title: Provenance
description: Every published field carries a provenance record so consumers can trace a claim back to its source.

source_id.description: Slug of the source in the source register (e.g. 'doa.gov.lk', 'hordi', 'meteo.gov.lk').

quote.description: Verbatim excerpt from the source that supports the extracted value. Required for numeric fields.

extractor_version.description: Git SHA or semver of the extractor that produced this value.

model_id.description: Model identifier when LLM-assisted extraction was used (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6').

prompt_version.description: Identifier of the prompt template used for LLM extraction.
